hero.subtitle: Choose a scenario · Set the location · Get a disciplined estimate

scenario.label: Scenario
scenario.headline: Choose your solar system type
scenario.subline: Select the system type that matches your needs to start the right calculation flow

onGrid.label: On-Grid
onGrid.description: Grid-connected solar. Bill savings, self-consumption, export revenue, and ROI analysis.
onGrid.decisionHint: Use when the site has grid access and the main goal is bill reduction and proposal readiness.
onGrid.forWhom: Suitable for homes, offices, and commercial facilities
onGrid.nextAction: Validate the site, bill evidence, tariff source, and supplier quote before quote-ready approval.
onGrid.confidenceHint: Best for commercial proposals when PVGIS, bill evidence, and source checks are verified.
onGrid.resultCaution: Proposal language should remain conditional until site, tariff, bill, and supplier evidence are verified.

offGrid.label: Off-Grid
offGrid.description: Grid-independent solar. Battery capacity, critical load autonomy, and dispatch analysis.
offGrid.decisionHint: Use when the load must run without grid access or grid reliability is not acceptable.
offGrid.forWhom: Suitable for rural properties, caravans, boats, and remote sites
offGrid.workflowLabel: Off-grid pre-feasibility and battery dispatch workflow
offGrid.nextAction: Define critical loads and validate autonomy with field evidence before proposal approval.
offGrid.confidenceHint: Surplus PV is not monetized; confidence depends on battery dispatch and critical-load evidence.
offGrid.resultCaution: This is a pre-feasibility autonomy estimate, not a field guarantee or final off-grid design.

agriculturalIrrigation.label: Agricultural Irrigation
agriculturalIrrigation.description: Seasonal pump loads, daytime solar match, and rural operating cost reduction.
agriculturalIrrigation.resultFrame: Daytime irrigation load offset and seasonal yield
agriculturalIrrigation.nextAction: Confirm pump power, watering season, and daytime load profile before quote-ready approval.
agriculturalIrrigation.confidenceHint: Confidence depends on pump schedule and seasonal consumption evidence.

heatPump.label: Heat Pump
heatPump.description: Heating/cooling electrification, SPF assumptions, and solar offset.
heatPump.nextAction: Validate heated area, insulation class, and current heating fuel cost assumptions.
heatPump.confidenceHint: Heat pump SPF and building envelope assumptions are the dominant risk.

flexibleMobile.label: Flexible Panel / Caravan / Boat
flexibleMobile.description: Portable loads, compact off-grid use, and simplified client-facing guidance.
flexibleMobile.resultFrame: Portable solar and compact battery autonomy
flexibleMobile.nextAction: Confirm daily appliance loads and storage target; keep commercial proposal controls optional.
flexibleMobile.confidenceHint: Use as an early sizing estimate unless field load measurements are attached.

evCharging.label: EV Charging Station
evCharging.description: Charging demand, daytime solar synergy, and commercial electricity offset.
evCharging.resultFrame: Solar-backed EV charging demand and ROI
evCharging.nextAction: Confirm charge sessions, charger power, and daytime utilization before quote-ready approval.
evCharging.confidenceHint: Charging profile evidence and commercial tariff validation drive quote confidence.

step2.search: Search an address, street, neighborhood, district, or city...
step2.geoUnsupported: Your browser does not support location detection.
step2.helperTitle: Search an address or click the map
step2.helperBody: Street, neighborhood, district, and city matches are listed together. Choose the most accurate result.

step3.drawGuideTitle: Tool guide for measuring the roof area
step3.drawGuidePolygon: Freeform: follow the roof boundary corner by corner
step3.drawGuideRect: Rectangle: use fast measurement for regular roofs
step3.drawGuideEdit: Edit: move points and update the area
step3.drawGuideDelete: Delete: clear the measurement and start over
step3.drawToastStart: Click roof corners and double-click to finish. The rectangle tool is faster for regular roofs.

step4.title: Equipment Selection
step4.subtitle: Choose the panel, inverter, and battery setup that fits the system.

step5.title: Financial Parameters
step5.subtitle: Set tariff, consumption, and advanced financial options.

step6.title: Calculating...
step6.subtitle: Fetching PVGIS solar irradiance data...
step6.quote: "Solar energy is clean, abundant, and free; the strongest investment is the one made today."

step7.title: Your Results Are Ready
step7.subtitle: A 25-year energy and financial projection is shown below with transparent assumptions.

finance.tariffDesc: 2026 tariff selection evaluates PST, SKTT, and contracted-power options by project conditions. Verify unit rates against your bill.

engine.pvgisFallbackBanner: ⚠ PVGIS API could not be reached. Local solar data is being used.
engine.comparisonUnavailableHint: Backend pvlib comparison was not run for this calculation. No difference data — this does not mean 0%.

governance.title: Proposal Governance
governance.subtitle: Approval, margin, financing, and maintenance assumptions

onGridFlow.title: Customer, consumption, and settlement basis
onGridFlow.subtitle: This section captures the minimum data that drives self-consumption, settlement, and financial outputs. Without hourly data, the selected usage profile becomes a synthetic 8760 load curve.
onGridFlow.regulationNote: Settlement mode and commissioning date affect paid export. Missing date blocks quote-ready confidence.
onGridFlow.consumptionNote: kWh data is more defensible than bill amount. Monthly kWh improves SKTT/PST and self-consumption modeling.
onGridFlow.impactProfile: Usage profile changes the hourly load curve, self-consumption, and export.
onGridFlow.impactSettlement: Settlement mode determines paid export limits.
onGridFlow.impactRoof: Net roof area directly changes panel count and installed power.
onGridFlow.impactEvidence: Bill, tariff, and shading evidence drive confidence level.
onGridFlow.hourlyUploadHint: Single-column CSV with 8760 rows, one row per hour. If not uploaded, a synthetic profile is used.

onGridResult.missingHourly: No hourly consumption profile; synthetic profile used.
onGridResult.missingRoofGeometry: Roof geometry is not verified by map or site drawing.
onGridResult.missingShading: Shading is not verified by site or OSM data.
onGridResult.missingCostOverride: No cost override or supplier BOM was used.
onGridResult.missingTariffCheck: Tariff source check date is missing.
onGridResult.noMajorMissingData: No critical missing data is visible in this layer.
onGridResult.commercialNextAction: Complete evidence, supplier quote, and approval workflow before commercial offer.
onGridResult.noCommercialBlockers: Governance engine did not produce commercial blockers.
onGridResult.dataSourceQuestion: What data was this based on?
onGridResult.missingDataQuestion: What is missing for a quote?
onGridResult.engineDiffWarning: Engine difference exceeds 10% — different model and data source.

report.proposalTitle: Turkey Solar Energy and Investment Report
report.preFeasibilityDisclaimer: Pre-feasibility report only; it does not replace a final offer, structural project, or official permit document.
report.engineeringReportSubtitle: Review method, assumptions, and intermediate checks.
report.actionsNote: The PDF is for customer pre-feasibility, the Technical Appendix is for engineering review, and JSON files are for integration and CRM handoff.
report.sameAuthoritativeSource: This report, financial table, audit panel, and proposal export use the same authoritative production source. Financial cash flows are calculated by the frontend 8760 financial model, not by the backend estimate payload.
report.quoteReadyNote: Quote-ready output should be used as a customer proposal only when approval, bill evidence, supplier quote, tariff evidence, grid-application evidence, roof verification, and absence of critical blockers are all confirmed. This report does not replace structural design, legal advice, or official application documents.
report.pdfLibraryMissing: The PDF library could not be loaded. Check your internet connection.
report.technicalContentMissing: Technical report content could not be generated.
report.pdfFontNote: PDF uses a built-in font fallback; unsupported Turkish-specific glyphs may be transliterated in PDF output.
report.panelCountFormula: Panel count = floor(usable area ÷ panel area)
report.layoutNote: The 75% usable-area factor is a pre-feasibility assumption. Final IEC 62548-compliant layout requires field survey, fire access paths, maintenance corridors, and manufacturer mounting instructions.
report.stcNote: STC: 1000 W/m² irradiance, 25°C cell temperature, AM 1.5G spectrum. Panel standard
report.inverterNote: Inverter efficiency is a catalogue assumption. CEC/IEC 61683 curves and string operating points are not separately validated in this pre-feasibility calculation.
report.pvgisFallbackUsed: API unavailable — local PSH-based calculation was used
report.pvlibNote: The pvlib MVP path runs solar position, POA transposition, cell temperature, and PVWatts DC calculation in the backend. Inverter curves and AOI losses remain approximate.
report.pvgisNote: PVGIS is called with loss={loss}%; shading, soiling, bifacial, inverter, and cable losses are applied separately in the Solar Rota methodology ({version}).
report.pvgisIncludesTempAzimuth: Temperature and orientation are already handled inside the PVGIS/pvlib production model; no extra temperature multiplier is applied
report.prFormulaNote: POA is taken from PVGIS inclined-plane irradiance; fallback mode uses an approximate PSH-based value.
report.lcoeNote: LCOE comparison is a pre-feasibility indicator only; final proposal, financing, and tax conditions must be verified separately.
report.irrNote: If IRR exceeds the discount rate, the project produces positive NPV.
report.incomeFormula: Income = self-consumption × import tariff + paid export × export tariff
report.incomeFormulaOffGrid: Avoided energy cost = PV-served load × off-grid alternative energy cost; surplus PV is not monetized
report.paybackRowNote: The highlighted row marks the payback year. Annual expenses
report.offGridMetricNote: Off-grid metrics are a synthetic 8760 dispatch pre-check, not a guaranteed autonomy or sufficiency certificate.
report.lcoeShortNote: Lifetime expenses divided by total energy
report.lcoeShortNoteOffGrid: Lifetime expenses divided by PV+BESS-delivered load energy
report.simplePaybackPreTax: First year when cumulative net cash flow exceeds the investment basis

audit.purposeBody: Use it to see which data and evidence still need verification, not as a final approval signal.
audit.noCriticalAnomalies: No critical anomaly was found by the warning checks.
audit.selfConsumptionOffGrid: PV-served load / unmet load / curtailed PV
audit.privacyLocalOnly: Saved calculations are stored only in this browser's localStorage.

export.sharedInvalid: The share link is invalid or does not match the safe schema.

warnings.evidenceFileMissing: {item}: no verified file attachment and SHA-256 fingerprint.
warnings.tariffSourceDocumentMissing: tariffSource: no source document attachment or source URL.
warnings.tariffSourceStale: tariffSource: source check date is stale or missing.
warnings.regulationSourceStale: regulationSource: regulation source check date is older than 90 days or missing.
warnings.supplierQuoteValidityMissing: supplierQuote: validity date is missing; margin and sales price are risky.
warnings.tariffSourceStale45: Tariff source check date is older than 45 days or missing.
warnings.pvgisLiveDataMissing: PVGIS live data is unavailable; fallback production cannot be accepted as quote-ready.
warnings.roofGeometryUnverified: Roof geometry has not been verified by map or field drawing.
warnings.proposalInputsUnverified: Proposal assumptions have not been verified by an authorized user.
warnings.customerBillUnverified: Customer bill/consumption data has not been verified.
warnings.proposalNotApproved: Proposal approval state is not approved.
warnings.supplierBomMissing: Supplier BOM quote has not been received.
warnings.gridChecklistMissing: Grid application checklist has not been created.
warnings.approvalInvalidatedByMaterialChange: The proposal's commercial basis changed; the current approval is invalid and a new revision/approval is required.
warnings.syntheticConsumptionProfile: Synthetic consumption profile in use — no real hourly data. Self-consumption estimate is conservative.
warnings.grossTariffMode: Gross tariff mode: distribution fee will not be added separately.
warnings.manualTariff: Tariff was entered manually — no official source verification. Verify before commercial offer.
warnings.shadowQualityLow: Shading data is user estimate or unknown — engineering verification required.
warnings.noBomCostEvidence: No verified supplier BOM quote — cost estimate is based on catalog prices.

techTable.netMeteringOff: Off / surplus PV is not monetized

dashboard.selectHint: Select up to 3 calculations to compare:
dashboard.importError: Could not read the records file.

comparison.title: Quote Comparison
comparison.footnote: * Custom price entered. ✓ Best payback period. Comparison uses the same core financial table and hourly energy summary.

billAnalysis.csv8760Label: Load 8760-hour CSV (single-column kWh or comma/newline-delimited values)
billAnalysis.csv8760WrongCount: CSV must contain exactly 8760 hourly values. Found: {n}.
billAnalysis.csv8760ZeroTotal: CSV consumption profile must have a positive total kWh.

offGrid.costMissingWarn: No cost entered — using 2.5× grid tariff as default.
offGrid.nmBlockedWarn: Surplus PV is not monetized in off-grid mode.
offGrid.syntheticDispatchNote: These metrics are a synthetic 8760 dispatch pre-assessment — not a guarantee of off-grid sufficiency.
offGrid.notFeasibilityAnalysis: This is not a real off-grid feasibility analysis.
offGrid.modelLimits: Critical load, generator backup, and bad weather are modeled with simplified synthetic dispatch; this does not replace site measurement.
offGrid.preFeasibilityOnly: Pre-feasibility only — site measurement and detailed energy analysis required for commercial offer.
offGrid.gridIndependenceNote: Estimated independence ratio based on daily averages
offGrid.autonomousDaysNote: Estimated days covered by solar+battery only

agriculturalIrrigation.seasonWarn: 365-day annual usage assumed. If your irrigation season is shorter, adjust daily consumption accordingly.

settlementDate.label: System Commissioning Date
settlementDate.missing: System commissioning date is required when settlement mode is 'Auto'.

common.scrollHint: Scroll horizontally to see all table columns.

offgridL2.calculationModeHint: Basic mode gives quick pre-feasibility. Advanced mode raises the score when 8760 PV, total load and critical-load files are provided.
offgridL2.accuracyInterpretationFallback: A data-quality score was calculated; this band is not a guaranteed error bound.
offgridL2.criticalFractionHint: What percentage of total daily load is critical (always required)?
offgridL2.fieldDataHint: Phase 1 requires three real 8760 series. Phase 2 requires SHA-256 field evidence. Phase 4 requires acceptance files; Phase 5 requires active monitoring and maintenance records; Phase 6 requires periodic revalidation evidence.
offgridL2.deviceListEmpty: No devices added — simple mode (daily kWh + critical fraction) in use.
offgridL2.methodologyBody: These results are a synthetic 8760-hour dispatch pre-assessment. PV production hours are derived by distributing monthly production through a typical solar profile; critical-load priority and generator backup are simplified. A real off-grid feasibility study requires site measurement, load metering, and detailed energy analysis.
offgridL2.productionDispatchSynthetic: Dispatch PV profile: synthetic 8760 derived from monthly production
offgridL2.productionDispatchReal: Dispatch PV profile: real hourly PV 8760
offgridL2.fieldGuaranteeBlocked: Blocked — required Phase 1 inputs are missing
offgridL2.fieldGuaranteePhase1Ready: Phase 1 inputs complete — still not a field guarantee
offgridL2.fieldEvidenceBlocked: Blocked — required Phase 2 evidence is missing
offgridL2.fieldEvidenceReady: Phase 2 evidence complete — still not a field guarantee
offgridL2.fieldModelBlocked: Blocked — Phase 3 stress scenarios did not pass
offgridL2.fieldModelReady: Phase 3 stress scenarios passed — still not a field guarantee
offgridL2.fieldAcceptanceBlocked: Blocked — required Phase 4 acceptance/operations evidence is missing
offgridL2.fieldAcceptanceReady: Phase 4 acceptance file complete — field guarantee dossier ready
offgridL2.fieldOperationBlocked: Blocked — required Phase 5 active monitoring/maintenance evidence is missing
offgridL2.fieldOperationReady: Phase 5 active monitoring complete — field guarantee ready for active monitoring
offgridL2.fieldRevalidationBlocked: Blocked — required Phase 6 periodic revalidation/renewal evidence is missing
offgridL2.fieldRevalidationReady: Phase 6 revalidation complete — field guarantee continuity ready
offgridL2.genNarrativeActive: Generator ran for {hours} h/year, generating {kwh} kWh. Fuel cost: {cost} ₺/year. This output supported critical load coverage.
offgridL2.genNarrativeNone: No generator. If unmet load exists, the system relies solely on solar + battery.
offgridL2.genNarrativeUnmet: ⚠ Without a generator, {unmet} kWh/year remains unmet. Consider adding a generator or larger battery.
offgridL2.genNarrativeUnmetWithGenerator: ⚠ Even with the generator enabled, {unmet} kWh/year remains unmet. Generator capacity, fuel strategy, or battery sizing is insufficient.
offgridL2.generatorCapexMissing: Generator is enabled but CAPEX is 0; financial results may omit investment cost.
offgridL2.badWeatherNarrativeLight: Light bad weather: {days} consecutive low-output days simulated. Critical coverage −{critDrop}%, total −{totalDrop}%. System is {resilient} under these conditions.
offgridL2.badWeatherNarrativeModerate: Moderate bad weather: {days} consecutive overcast days simulated. Critical coverage −{critDrop}%. Extended cloud risk is {risk}.
offgridL2.badWeatherNarrativeSevere: Severe bad weather: {days} consecutive zero-output days simulated (Black Sea/mountain winter). Critical coverage −{critDrop}%. Generator or larger battery is critical for such regions.
offgridL2.honestUnmetWarning: ⚠ {unmet} kWh/year unmet — generator or additional battery capacity recommended.
offgridL2.honestSyntheticNote: Synthetic hourly dispatch — not a measured load profile.
offgridL2.honestPreFeasibility: Pre-feasibility estimate — not a guaranteed autonomy certificate.
offgridL2.honestSiteRequired: Commercial offer requires site measurement and detailed energy analysis.

pvgis.timeoutMsg: Live solar data request timed out — estimated model used.
pvgis.networkMsg: Live solar data unavailable (network error) — estimated model used.
pvgis.corsMsg: Browser security blocked live data access — estimated model used.
pvgis.httpErrorMsg: PVGIS service temporarily unavailable — estimated model used.
pvgis.genericMsg: Live solar data unavailable — local estimated model used.
pvgis.parityUnavailable: No comparison data (backend did not run or live data missing)
pvgis.parityZeroNote: Zero difference does not mean comparison was made — see parity status
